mapper.insert: insert into ai_event (task_id, attempt_id, event_type, actor_type, actor_id, event_data, create_time) values (#{taskId}, #{attemptId}, #{eventType}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{eventData}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, attempt_id as attemptId, event_type as eventType, actor_type as actorType, actor_id as actorId, event_data as eventData, create_time as createTime from ai_event where task_id = #{taskId} order by id desc limit 200
